posts.text: Iran’s theocratic regime is playing its cards deftly. Rather than chanting “Death to America”, as is traditional, its propaganda videos play up criticisms of Donald Trump that resonate with a global audience https://www.economist.com/culture/2026/04/17/in-the-ai-propaganda-war-iran-is-winning?taid=69e567d37d0c9b000141a936&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter
posts.author: TheEconomist

posts.text: BREAKING: Iran says it has attacked US military ships with drones in retaliation for the US striking and seizing an Iranian cargo vessel in the Strait of Hormuz, per Tasnim.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter

posts.text: The Iranians have now found Trump’s weak spot. Raising the stakes into the GLOBEX open…🤫🤫
